note: Instant formatting. `date` is the native Date produced by DateTime.toDateUtc (the prior Effect.map), then .toISOString() renders the ISO timestamp. This whole pipe (DateTime.now -> DateTime.toDateUtc -> date.toISOString) should collapse to DateTime.now.pipe(Effect.map(DateTime.formatIso)), dropping the toDateUtc round-trip. Clear instant (timestamp), not a span.

`mtime` is a native Date from FileSystem File.Info (stat.mtime: Option<Date>); this extracts epoch millis (mtimeMillis). Instant -> epoch-millis conversion; replacement is DateTime.toEpochMillis(DateTime.unsafeFromDate(mtime)). The source Date is fixed by the Effect FS contract, so the cast is unavoidable; human should confirm whether wrapping in DateTime is worthwhile vs. keeping the direct getTime on the externally-typed Date (matches the precedent set in beep__repo-ai-metrics/Date.json).
